sending_limits._comment: Free consumer Gmail (@gmail.com) SMTP is typically ~500 recipients per rolling 24h per account (Google may lower new/low-trust accounts). Google Workspace is higher—raise defaults or set per-account daily_send_limit.

email_settings.subject: Your Certificate of Participation
email_settings.body_template:
Hello {name},

Thank you for participating. Please find your certificate attached.

Best regards,
The Team
